case_title: JAMES F BLANDING VS. RICKEY LEE WHEATHERSBY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, JAMES F AS TO DEFENDANT WHEATHERSBY, RICKEY LEE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-20-2002. THE CASE SETTLED UNDER TERMS AS SET FORTH IN THE "MINI-MINUTES" OF THIS DATE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHEATHERSBY, RICKEY LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4404 THIRD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124 $3,191.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,191.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Ass'd for trial. APPEARANCES: Plaintiff James F. Blanding, in pro per; defendant Rickey L. Weathersby, in pro per. JUDGE: THOMAS J. MELLON, JR.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary Hinds; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. The case is settled as follows: Judgment for plaintiff, against defendant, including restitution of the premises at 4404 3rd St., San Francisco, CA, forfeiture of the rental agreement and total damages of $3,101.00. However, if defendant pays to plaintiff the sum of $3,191.00 by 6/1/02, execution of the above judgment will be stayed permanently.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-20-2002 Assigned To Trial Court
